name: X_mss_male_secreted_cluster
description: X-linked mss (male-secreted short) paralog cluster on C. elegans X chromosome. mss-1 through mss-5 plus secondary copies form a small tandem cluster of nearly identical ~250 bp ORFs encoding short secreted sperm-coat peptides. Lost in the C. elegans hermaphrodite branch but retained on the X in male-producing relatives; paralogs are at >95% identity where present.
